seoTitle: Doonan vs Doongul — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Doonan and Doongul. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Doonan and Doongul.
heading: Doonan vs Doongul — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Doonan, Queensland and Doongul, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Doongul has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Doonan (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Doonan or Doongul safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Doonan has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Doongul scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Doonan scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Doongul scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Doonan or Doongul?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Doongul has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
